title: Stardew Valley Fishing
body:
## Stardew Valley fishing minigame.
_This plugin change the default **fishing** experience into a minigame from **Stardew Valley**._
Once you start fishing, everything appears normal until you hook a fish. At that moment, a new fishing ui appears just above the hotbar, featuring three elements: water, a green catch zone, and fish itself.
![hook a fish](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2c53ee5189ab46a08e9d6153fcf6ffcde5a9a521.gif)

To successfully catch the fish, you must keep the green zone over the moving fish for a specified duration (default is 4 seconds). Use your left mouse button (LMB) to move the green zone by one cell to the right. If you stop clicking, the zone will slowly slide back to the left. The time requirement is co~~~~nfigurable.
![fishing ui](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/24e3cfcc3286745330b5f4fda9021e67a503f06c.gif)

Each fish you catch comes with randomized attributes: name, rarity, weight and length. All of these properties can be customized in the config file.

![icy clown](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c0daa17aac190fac9aa9203ef09f2107db26525e.jpeg)

## Fishing BOBBERS
- ![Firework for fish bobber](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ba63f43f5d63b8fada556cf5a1c2c86e7499cb04.png)
